---
title: "Computing for the Social Sciences: Lecture 7"
subtitle: "Topics: Intermediate dplyr; Renaming & Recoding Variables"
author: "Sabrina Nardin, Summer 2026"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: simple
    slide-number: true
    incremental: false
    css: ../style/styles.css
    code-overflow: wrap
    highlight-style: github
    ratio: 16:9
    chalkboard: true
    toc: false
    center: true
---

# Agenda {.center}

::: {.agenda-list}
1. Review and expand your ability to manipulate data with `dplyr` functions (“verbs”)
2. Rename and recode variables using `rename()`, `recode()`, and `case_when()`
3. Identify syntactic vs. non-syntactic variable names and handle them correctly
:::

---

### Slides are in progress and will be updated before class.

::: {.content-hidden}

<!--
<span style="font-size: 0.8em; color: #666;">
*Slides last updated on **October 15, 2025**. Slides authored by Sabrina Nardin. AI used to polish slides style and fix typos.*
</span>
-->

:::
